name: Kinnicutt Bus Inc
principals: Donna Kenny (Owner; daughter of founder Howard J. Kinnicutt)
districts_or_customers: Albany / Menands area school transportation; NY State DOT registered bus operator
recent_news: Founder Howard J. Kinnicutt passed in 2005; long-standing small family operator now run by daughter Donna Kenny — classic succession candidate
fit_notes: Small (~$0.9M rev, 20 emp) second-generation family operator in Albany NY — sub-scale tuck-in but classic succession profile in a Summit/Durham historic market. Likely too small to move the needle on its own; only attractive as part of a broader NY Capital Region rollup.

name: Glen Rhinard Transportation
districts_or_customers: Northwest Area School District area / Luzerne County PA (Shickshinny region)
recent_news: No M&A or news found; quiet owner-operated rural PA contractor founded ~1990
fit_notes: Owner-name eponymous PA operator (~35+ yrs in business) suggests aging principal and succession opportunity. Sub-scale ($0.9M rev) — only fits as a bolt-on to a NE PA cluster, but limited visible footprint and no website is a diligence red flag.

name: Keystone Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Likely DuBois-area / Brookville / Jefferson County PA school transportation (Reynoldsville, PA)
recent_news: No news found; not to be confused with Keystone School Bus Services Inc of Wyomissing PA (a separate Berks County operator that spun off from Gross Bus Service in 2011)
fit_notes: Very low online footprint — rural Jefferson County PA operator with no phone listed and an outdated address (RD 2 Box 121a). Could be defunct or absorbed locally. Worth a phone outreach only if cluster build-out in DuBois/Brookville area is priority; otherwise skip.

name: JRZ Transportation Inc
districts_or_customers: Irwin, PA / Westmoreland County area (Norwin SD region — though Norwin's prime contractor is First Student)
recent_news: JRZ Transportation Inc filed Chapter bankruptcy on 06/12/2024 in Pennsylvania Western Bankruptcy Court (Case 2:24-bk-21463). DISQUALIFIED — distressed / likely defunct.
fit_notes: DO NOT PURSUE as a tuck-in — JRZ filed bankruptcy in June 2024, indicating insolvency/wind-down. Could be relevant only as a distressed asset/route pick-up via the bankruptcy estate (PA Western District) if Summit wants Westmoreland County exposure; assume routes have already been reassigned.

name: Sullivan Bus Barn Trnsprtn
principals: Tom Slezak (Director of Transportation, Sullivan School District)
recent_news: Not a private contractor — 1073 E Vine St is Sullivan Sr. High School address; 'Sullivan Bus Barn' is the school district's own transportation garage. Tom Slezak is the District Transportation Director per ZoomInfo and district website.
fit_notes: DISQUALIFIED — not an acquisition target. This is the Sullivan MO public school district's in-house bus garage, not a private contractor. Only relevant as a future outsourcing/conversion sales lead for Summit's district-contracting business development team.
